meta_title: International Removals in Lewes - Mark Ratcliffe Moving
meta_description: If you are moving abroad and seeking a reliable removals company to take on such a big project - look no further than Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage. We offer professional International Removals in Lewes and East Sussex

raw_body:
EMAIL US

International Removals in Lewes

Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage don't just offer reliable removals - we offer many storage and packing options to help your move abroad run as smoothly as possible.

How can we help you today?

Are you Moving Abroad?

International Removals in Lewes

Are you starting a new life abroad? Perhaps you are taking your business to a new location overseas? Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage are here to help your move run as smoothly as possible. We have a number of agents worldwide in over 200 countries who are here to help your move go ahead as expertly as possible. Your belongings are closely tracked from start to finish - through customs clearance right up to your new location. We offer to unwrap and set up all of your goods so you can quickly begin your new life in a new country.

Moving abroad has become so popular in recent times due to transport being so accessible and an increasing range of opportunities and experiences abroad. Whether you are a student, a young family or retiring to a new place - we are here to help you transport your life to your new destination. Our team are fully trained, insured and are prepared to handle any moving project. It is within our company ethos to always put the customer first, so we get to know your exact requirements and make sure we tailor our service to your needs. We always handle client's belongings with care and caution, so they reach their destination unharmed. Over our many years in business, we have grown and grown and are proud of the reputation we now have as one of the most reliable removals firms in the area for international moves.

International & European Removals

We work with you to plan a detailed approach as to what transport methods suit you best. We can transport your good via road, air and shipping - whichever is the most effective and efficient. Should you require, we offer a packing service whereby our team safely pack your belongings using professional tools and materials. Or if you prefer to pack your goods yourself, we highly recommend using our high quality tools which are available to be purchased at our shop. Here, we offer various sized cartons, plain paper, tissue paper, bubble wrap and 2" vinyl tape. We also offer to unpack your goods at your new location should you require this service. We even offer portable wardrobe cartons to keep your clothes clean and crease free.

Are you moving your business abroad? We also help with commercial international moves. We can provide A3 plastic stacking crates for files, trucks and dollies to cater for all office moves. We even offer furniture dismantling and reassembling at your new location if this is of interest. We have many storage options for all domestic and commercial clients in the form of warehouse containers or storage rooms. On depository, we will take a full inventory of all of your goods. You will then be charged by the day, so you only pay for the time you use. We work 7 days a week, on a flexible basis - so we are available weekends and bank holidays.

Why Choose Us?

We are proud to have built up a loyal client base of happy customers. Here is what Andrew had to say about his move to Thailand working with us:

"Dear Mark, Thank you for the excellent way that you transported all my belongings from Eastbourne to Sakon Nakhon, Thailand. Everything arrived in good condition and exactly in the timeframe that you had told me. The delivery company accepted that I changed the delivery address without any hassle so everything was delivered to my new home. The guys who delivered were excellent. They were very polite and courteous and spoke excellent English. I can thoroughly recommend your service which, for me, was efficient and worry free."

To read more reviews, simply click here.

Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage take pride in offering professional and reliable service at competitive prices, just get in touch today for your free quote! Call 01323 848 008 or complete the form at the top of this page.
